briefs.title: BC Regulation Creates New Power Supply Rules for AI Data Centres and Hydrogen Facilities
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 8/2026, in force January 30, 2026, establishes a new framework under the Utilities Commission Act governing how AI data centres, conventional data centres, and hydrogen-for-export facilities connect to and receive power from BC's electricity distribution system.
briefs.action_required: If you operate or plan to build an AI data centre, conventional data centre, or hydrogen-for-export facility in BC, review the new connection and competitive process requirements immediately.
